articles/poslink/onedrive.html.title: POS Retail Connect — SharePoint / OneDrive integrācija | POS Retail Connect
articles/poslink/onedrive.html.keywords: POS Retail Connect — SharePoint / OneDrive integrācija 1. Pārskats POS Retail Connect nodrošina kopēju SharePoint / OneDrive failu apmaiņas mehānismu, kuru var izmantot jebkurš POS Retail Connect modulis gan failu nosūtīšanai (augšupielāde uz SharePoint/OneDrive), gan failu saņemšanai (lejupielāde no SharePoint/OneDrive). Piemērs: POS Retail Connect Scale modulis augšupielādē svaru grupas failus; citi moduļi var lejupielādēt failus, ko ārējās sistēmas ir novietojušas noteiktā mapē. Savienojumi tiek konfigurēti centralizēti lapā SharePoint Connections un katrs modulis savos uzstādījumos norāda izmantojamā savienojuma kodu. Autentifikācija notiek caur Microsoft Graph API ar OAuth2 Client Credentials plūsmu (lietotne-uz-lietotni, bez lietotāja iesaistīšanas, bez Refresh Token ). Izmantojot Client Credentials, tokens tiek iegūts tieši no Azure AD ar Client ID un Client Secret — nav nepieciešama lietotāja autorizācija vai tokenu atjaunošanas plūsma. 2. Azure AD lietotnes reģistrācija 2.1 Reģistrācija Dodieties uz portal.azure.com → Microsoft Entra ID → App registrations → New registration . Nosaukums: **BC ELVA Retail Integration** (vai cits uzņēmumam nozīmīgs nosaukums). Account types: Accounts in this organizational directory only . Register . 2.2 Klienta noslēpums (Client Secret) Certificates & secrets → New client secret . Apraksts: **BC ELVA Retail Integration Secret** . Derīguma termiņš: 24 mēneši (maksimālais standarta termiņš). ⚠️ Uzreiz pēc izveidošanas iestatiet Calendar / Outlook atgādinājumu 23 mēnešu laikā. Pēc termiņa beigām failu apmaiņa nedarbosies! Nokopējiet noslēpuma Value — tas redzams tikai vienu reizi. Dynamics 365 Business Central uzstādījumos: ievadiet Client ID un Secret, aizpildiet Client Secret Expiry Date lauku ar reālo beigu datumu. Vērtīgs padoms: Dynamics 365 Business Central brīdinās, ja noslēpuma termiņš ir mazāks par 30 dienām, un prasīs lietotāja apstiprinājumu turpināt failu apmaiņu, ja termiņš jau beidzies. 2.3 API atļaujas Atļauja Tips Kāpēc vajadzīga **Files.ReadWrite.All** Application ( nevis Delegated) OneDrive failu lasīšanai un rakstīšanai **Sites.ReadWrite.All** Application ( nevis Delegated) SharePoint failu lasīšanai un rakstīšanai ⚠️ Kritisks solis: Pēc atļauju pievienošanas ir obligāti jānoklikšķina Grant admin consent for [jūsu organizācija] . Blakus katrai atļaujai jāparādās zaļai atzīmei ar tekstu "Granted for...". Ja atzīme nav zaļa — augšupielāde neizdosies ar 401 kļūdu. ⚠️ Svarīgi: Atļaujām jābūt Application tipam, nevis Delegated . Kļūda "Unsupported app only token" nozīmē, ka atļaujas ir uzstādītas kā Delegated. 3. OneDrive — pakalpojuma konts 3.1 Izmantojiet speciālu pakalpojuma kontu Neizmantojiet parasta darbinieka e-pasta adresi laukā "OneDrive User Email". Ja darbinieks mainās un tā konts tiek slēgts — integrācija nedarbojas. Ieteicamais risinājums: Izveidojiet speciālu Microsoft 365 pakalpojuma kontu , piem., **retailintegration@contoso.onmicrosoft.com** . Piešķiriet tam SharePoint/OneDrive licenci (nepieciešama, lai OneDrive būtu aktivizēts). Šim kontam ir jāpieslēdzas OneDrive vismaz vienu reizi, lai tiktu inicializēta krātuve. Dokumentējiet šo kontu IT sistēmu sarakstā. Alternatīva: Izmantojiet SharePoint dokumentu bibliotēku (nevis OneDrive) — tad personīgā konta problēma nebūs. 4. SharePoint — vietnes priekšnosacījumi 4.1 Vietne jāizveido pirms Dynamics 365 Business Central konfigurācijas Dynamics 365 Business Central neizveido SharePoint vietnes automātiski. Vietnei jābūt izveidotai iepriekš, jo SharePoint vietnes izveide ir nozīmīga IT administratīva darbība — tā izveido Microsoft 365 grupu, pastkastes, kalendārus, Teams kanālus u.c. Soļi pirms Dynamics 365 Business Central konfigurācijas: SharePoint admin atvērt SharePoint Admin Center → Sites → Active sites → Create . Izvēlēties vietnes veidu (piemēram, Team site vai Communication site ). Nosaukums, URL, īpašnieks. Pēc izveides pārliecināties, ka vismaz viena dokumentu bibliotēka ir redzama. Ieteicamais URL piemērs: **https://contoso.sharepoint.com/sites/RetailIntegration** () Piezīme: Mapes ceļš (gan augšupielādei, gan lejupielādei) tiek konfigurēts katra moduļa uzstādījumos, nevis kopējā savienojuma konfigurācijā. 4.2 Piekļuves prasības Azure AD lietotnei ( **BC ELVA Retail Integration** ) nav nepieciešams kļūt par vietnes dalībnieku — **Sites.ReadWrite.All** Application atļauja piešķir piekļuvi visām vietnēm. 5. Azure AD lietotnes reģistrācija Dynamics 365 Business Central Lai Dynamics 365 Business Central varētu izmantot izveidoto App Registration (no 2.–3. soļa), klienta ID jāreģistrē arī Dynamics 365 Business Central pusē — lapas Microsoft Entra Applications (iepriekš: AAD Applications) sarakstā. 5.1 Pievienošana Dynamics 365 Business Central Dynamics 365 Business Central meklējiet Microsoft Entra Applications Nospiediet New Aizpildiet: Lauks Vērtība Client ID Ielīmējiet Application (client) ID no Azure AD Description Piem., **ELVA Retail BC Integration** State **Enabled** Nospiediet Grant Consent — tas izveido service principal jūsu tenantā un saista to ar Dynamics 365 Business Central Sadaļā User Permission Sets pievienojiet katra moduļa Permission Set, kuram nepieciešama piekļuve Dynamics 365 Business Central API. Pievienojiet tikai tās tiesibas, kuras reāli tiek izmantotas. Minimāli vajadzīga lasīšanas/rakstīšanas piekļuve tiem Dynamics 365 Business Central API resursiem, kurus izmanto attiecīgais modulis. 5.2 Kāpēc abi soļi ir nepieciešami Azure AD App Registration (2.–3. solis) piešķir tiesības Azure AD pusē (Microsoft Graph izsaukumiem no Dynamics 365 Business Central). Registrēšana Dynamics 365 Business Central Entra Applications pusē piešķir tiesības Dynamics 365 Business Central pusē (ārējais modulis vai sistēma var izsaukt Dynamics 365 Business Central API). Abi soļi jāizpilda. 6. Ārējo aģentu — lasīšanas piekļuve ⚠️ Šis punkts attiecas uz ārējiem aģentiem vai sistēmām, kas lejupielādē failus no SharePoint/OneDrive (piemēram, POS Retail Connect Scale aģents, kas ielasa svaru failus; vai jebkurš cits POS Retail Connect modulis, kurš saņem failus no ārējās sistēmas). 6.1 Problēma Dynamics 365 Business Central augšupielādē vai novieto failus SharePoint/OneDrive ar **Sites.ReadWrite.All** / **Files.ReadWrite.All** . Ārējā sistēma vai Dynamics 365 Business Central modulis, kurš nolasa šos failus, var izmantot to pašu savienojumu vai atsevišķu. 6.2 Risinājums Ir divas iespējas: A) Tas pats Azure AD app + tās pašas atļaujas: Konfigurējiet aģentu ar tiem pašiem Client ID un Secret. **Files.ReadWrite.All** / **Sites.ReadWrite.All** ietver arī lasīšanas tiesības. B) Atsevišķs lasīšanas konts (ieteicams drošībai): Izveidojiet otru App Registration, piem., **BC ELVA Retail Reader** . Piešķiriet tikai **Files.Read.All** vai **Sites.Read.All** (Application). Konfigurējiet aģentu ar šī otrā app Client ID un Secret. Princips "mazāk atļauju — mazāks risks" — ja aģenta akreditācijas dati tiek nopludināti, var tikai lasīt, nevis rakstīt. 7. Dynamics 365 Business Central konfigurācija 7.1 Atļaut HttpClient pieprasījumus Pirms jebkurš POS Retail Connect paplašinājums var izsaukt ārējos pakalpojumus (Graph API), jāiespējo izejošie HTTP pieprasījumi katram paplašinājumam, kas izmanto SharePoint/OneDrive integrāciju: Dynamics 365 Business Central atveriet Extension Management (Paplašinājumu pārvaldību) Atrodiet attiecīgo paplašinājumu (piemēram, POS Retail Connect Scale , vai jebkuru citu moduli, kas veic failu apmaiņu) Nospiediet trīs punktus → Allow HttpClient Requests → iestatiet Yes Šis iestatījums jāiespējo katram paplašinājumam, kas veic HTTP izsaukumus. Bez tā visi HTTP izsaukumi neizdosies bez kļūdas ziņojuma. 7.2 SharePoint Connections — kopējais savienojumu saraksts Visi savienojumi tiek konfigurēti vienā centralizētā vietā — Dynamics 365 Business Central meklējiet SharePoint Connections . Katrs ieraksts ir atsevišķs savienojums (var konfigurēt vairākus dažādiem moduļiem vai vietnēm). Lauks Vērtība Piemērs Code Unikāls savienojuma kods **SCALE-SP** , **IMPORT-OD** Description Apraksts **Scale eksports uz SharePoint** , **Imports no OneDrive** Delivery Method SharePoint vai OneDrive for Business Site URL Pilns vietnes URL ar **https://** **https://contoso.sharepoint.com/sites/RetailIntegration** Client ID Azure AD App's Application (client) ID **xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx** Client Secret Klienta noslēpuma vērtība (ievadīt reizi, tiek šifrēts Isolated Storage) Client Secret Expiry Date Noslēpuma beigu datums **31.12.2026** OneDrive User Email Pakalpojuma konta UPN (tikai OneDrive) **retailintegration@contoso.onmicrosoft.com** Azure AD Tenant ID Atstāt tukšu SaaS vidē; aizpildīt OnPrem **contoso.onmicrosoft.com** vai GUID Pēc aizpildīšanas izmantojiet pogu Test Connection , lai pārbaudītu savienojumu. 7.3 Moduļa uzstādījumi — savienojuma piesaiste Katrs modulis savos uzstādījumos norāda, kuru savienojumu izmantot, ar lauku SharePoint Connection Code . Mapes ceļš un citi moduļa specifiskie parametri (piemēram, augšupielādes vai lejupielādes mape, arhīva mape) tiek konfigurēti katra moduļa uzstādījumos, nevis kopējā savienojumā. Tipiskais princips: Eksportam (Dynamics 365 Business Central → SharePoint/OneDrive): modulis raksta failu norādītajā mapē. Importam (SharePoint/OneDrive → Dynamics 365 Business Central): modulis nolasa failus no norādītās mapes un pēc apstrādes pārvieto tos uz arhīva mapi. Modulis Uzstādījumu lapa Moduļa specifiskie lauki POS Retail Connect Scale Scale Integration Setup (Device Group) SharePoint Connection Code, SharePoint Folder Path Citi moduļi Katra moduļa Setup lapa SharePoint Connection Code, mapes ceļi atbilstoši moduļa loģikai 8. OnPrem — īpaši apsvērumi 8.1 Automātiskā nomnieka noteikšana Dynamics 365 Business Central vides tips GetAadTenantId() Ko ievadīt laukā "Azure AD Tenant ID" SaaS (Dynamics 365 Business Central Online) Atgriež GUID automātiski Atstāt tukšu OnPrem ar Azure AD autentifikāciju Atgriež GUID automātiski Atstāt tukšu OnPrem ar NavUserPassword autentifikāciju Atgriež tukšu Jāaizpilda manuāli Dynamics 365 Business Central automātiski mēģinās "uzminēt" nomnieku no SharePoint URL (piem., **https://contoso.sharepoint.com** → **contoso.onmicrosoft.com** ), bet šī uzminēšana ir rezerves variants — ja jūsu tenant izmanto pielāgotu domēnu (nevis **.onmicrosoft.com** ), aizpildiet lauku manuāli. 8.2 Manuāla nomnieka ID aizpildīšana Pieņemamās vērtības: Tenant GUID: **xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx** Tenant domēns: **contoso.onmicrosoft.com** Pielāgots domēns: **contoso.com** (ja konfigurēts Azure AD) 9. Bieżākās kļūdas Kļūda Iemesls Risinājums HTTP 401 "Unsupported app only token" Atļaujas uzstādītas kā Delegated Mainīt uz Application + piešķirt admin consent HTTP 401 pēc atļauju pievienošanas OAuth2 tokens kešots līdz 60 min Atvērt jaunu Dynamics 365 Business Central sesiju "Client Secret has expired" Secret termiņš beidzies Izveidot jaunu secret Azure AD, atjaunināt Dynamics 365 Business Central "Azure AD Tenant ID could not be determined" OnPrem NavUserPassword Aizpildīt lauku "Azure AD Tenant ID" "User not found" / 404 OneDrive E-pasts nepareizs vai OneDrive nav aktivizēts Pārbaudīt UPN, pieslēgties ar kontu OneDrive SharePoint mājaslapa 404 Vietne neeksistē IT admins jāizveido vietne iepriekš HttpClient izsaukums neizdodas bez kļūdas Paplašinājumam nav atļauts HttpClient Extension Management → Allow HttpClient Requests = Yes 10. Ātrs pārbaudes algoritms (TestConnection) Savienojuma lapā SharePoint Connection ir pieejama poga Test Connection . Tā veic 5 soļus: Iegūst OAuth2 tokenu (pārbauda Client ID + Secret). Pārbauda, vai tokens ir derīgs Graph API ( **GET /organization** ). Pārbauda Graph API atļaujas ( **GET /sites/root** ). Atrisina diskdziņa URL (atrod SharePoint vietni / OneDrive lietotāju). Pārbauda, vai mērķa mape eksistē (informatīvi — mape tiks izveidota automātiski).

articles/poslink/overview.html.title: Pārskats | POS Retail Connect
articles/poslink/overview.html.keywords: Pārskats POS Retail Connect ir biznesa programmatūras risinājums, kas izstrādāts ELVA. POS Retail Connect ir pilnībā integrēta ar Dynamics 365 Business Central paplašinot funkcionalitāti un pielāgojoties vietējās likumdošanas un uzņēmējdarbības prasībām. POS Retail Connect iekļauj sevī iekļauj sekojošus appus: POS Retail Connect Store Management POS Retail Connect Item Management POS Retail Connect Pricing Management POS Retail Connect Loyalty Management POS Retail Connect Label Printing POS Retail Connect Gift Card Management POS Retail Connect POS POS Retail CHDPOS Connector POS Retail Connect Scale POS Retail Connect Tracking Management EN

articles/support/customer_terms.html.title: Elva Baltic App Customer Terms | POS Retail Connect
articles/support/customer_terms.html.keywords: Elva Baltic App Customer Terms These Elva Baltic App Customer Terms ("App Terms") forms the basis for the Elva Baltic Customer Agreement ("Customer Agreement") governing a Elva Baltic App add-on to Microsoft Dynamics 365 (hereafter the "App"). The overall Customer Agreement consists of: These App Terms The Microsoft Customer Agreement for Microsoft Online Services (if applicable, i.e. if you are enrolled for Microsoft Online Services). The Order Form Other terms and conditions agreed to between EB and you (if applicable). Important - Read through these Elva Baltic App Customer Terms before continuing registration. By clicking the "I accept" button or otherwise accepting these terms, you agree to follow and be bound by these terms. By installing, having installed, or using the App and service, you accept these terms. If you do not accept them, do not install, have installed or use the Software. If you comply with these terms, you have the rights below. If an individual enters into this agreement on behalf of a company or other legal entity, that individual represents that he or she has the authority to bind that entity to this agreement. 1. Other Apps may also be sold as App but not through the Microsoft CSP. These terms apply to all Apps developed by EB and sold as App. 2. Defined terms may be used in the singular or plural. The words below are agreed to mean as follows: "Agreement" shall mean these App terms, including any and all Addendums made thereto (existing at the signing date or later created), which form an integral part of the Customer Agreement. "Invoice" shall mean the invoice or final order confirmation confirming finalization of your Order Form and defining the Term of the Subscription. "Customer" shall mean You, a customer of EB who has entered into this Agreement to use the App for your its own use. "Customer Data" means data, including all text, sound, video, or image files, and software, that are provided to EB and/or Microsoft by You or on your behalf while using the App. "EB" means Elva Baltic, SIA. "Order Form" shall mean a form provided by EB on which you place and order of the App to EB. Orders are not binding until accepted by EB. "Partner of Record" means a specific Microsoft partner supplying Microsoft Apps, as designated. "App" and "App and service" shall mean one or more of EB's software solutions provided under this agreement as a service (App). The specific App may be specified in a separate agreement between you and and/or EB. "Subscription" means the right to use the App as a service on a term basis, for one or more Units. "Term" means the duration of a Subscription (e.g. 30 days or 12 months). "Units" means a metric for a particular subscription license (e.g. licensed user seats, devices). "You" shall mean the legal entity who has entered into this agreement. 3. USAGE RIGHTS AND LIMITATIONS Upon EB's acceptance of your Order Form and for the duration of the term defined on your Invoice, you have the nonexclusive, non-assignable, royalty free, worldwide limited right to use the services solely for your internal business operations and subject to the terms of this Agreement and the Order Form. PRODUCT SUPPORT For the EB Apps, EB makes web-based support available and is your point of contact and reference in respect of queries, complaints and technical support. Web-based is available under the URL: elvabaltic.lv/help . Support Services. EB will provide support services including but not limited to: account set-up; sign up, accounts and billing; "how to" articles and FAQs; service and software updates; software configuration; performance issues within EB span of control; client connectivity and client desktop; and service availability issues within EB span of control. 6. SUBSCRIPTION RENEWAL, TERM AND TERMINATION As stated in section 3.1 of this Agreement, your Subscription shall commence on the date indicated in your Invoice, once your Order Form has been accepted by EB. During that Term, EB may invoice you in regular increments by sending an invoice to a single individual or email address designated by you. These App Customer Terms apply to you during the Term. The Term of the agreement renews automatically unless, prior to the date of your next invoice, EB receives either directly from you, your written notification that you do not wish to renew. Otherwise, you agree to pay renewal charges. At this time, subscriptions that are cancelled will not incur an early termination charge. At a future date, however, early termination charges may be incurred for new subscriptions that are cancelled prior to their expiration, at Microsoft's and/or EB's discretion. In addition to any other rights and remedies at law, EB shall be entitled to terminate this Agreement forthwith by giving written notice if: you commit any breach of this Agreement and if the breach is capable of remedy, fail to remedy it within 30 days after being given a written notice containing full particulars of the breach and requiring it to be remedied; or you become directly or indirectly involved, in the design, development, manufacture and/or distribution of any products which compete directly with the App. Obligations Surviving Termination. Notwithstanding any expiration or termination of this Agreement and any exercise of rights by you under a separate agreement hereunder, the following rights and obligations shall survive any such termination or exercise of rights necessary to permit their complete fulfillment or discharge: EB right's right to receive or recover, and your obligation to pay any fees or other sums payable which are vested in, accrued or accruable at the time of termination or exercise of such rights. In addition to the rights and obligations which survive as expressly provided in this Agreement, the Articles and Schedules which by their nature should survive, shall survive and continue after any termination or expiration hereunder. 10. OTHER This Agreement is personal to you, you are not entitled to assign, mortgage, charge, or otherwise transfer or sub-license any rights under this Agreement, except with prior written approval. Governing Law - Jurisdiction. The laws and jurisdiction of Latvia shall apply. Notwithstanding the foregoing, the EB reserve the right to seek and obtain injunctive relief, whether in the form of a temporary restraining order, preliminary injunction, injunction to enforce an arbitration award, or other order of similar import, including obtaining full payment of all fees and costs under this Agreement from any court of competent jurisdiction.

articles/support/privacy_statement.html.title: Elva Baltic Privacy Statement | POS Retail Connect
articles/support/privacy_statement.html.keywords: Elva Baltic Privacy Statement [Updated 30.08.2018] Introduction Elva Baltic (We, Us) is intended to respect and protect your privacy. This privacy statement describes how Elva Baltic collects, uses, protects and shares personal information of users. This privacy statement shall be subject to, governed by and construed in accordance with laws and Regulations of Republic of Latvia and European Union. Data We Collect Elva Baltic collects data that is needed to operate the cooperation with you. We collect information in several ways: Information You give us. Personal identifiers such as First name, Last name, company, country; Contact details such as e-mail, Phone number and other information required for business between You and Elva Baltic. Information third parties provide. Elva Baltic may get information from other parties and sources about you and your company. Information collected automatically. Elva Baltic is using automatic information logging about you and your computer, when our Websites are being accessed. Information logged using "Cookies". Elva Baltic sites uses "cookies" - small text files that are placed on your computer. In general, cookies are used to retain user preferences and provide anonymous tracking data to third party applications "Cookies" will make your browsing experience better. How We Use Personal Data Elva Baltic use personal information for following reasons: to prepare offers of our products, solutions and services, to prepare such agreements as licensing, non-disclosure agreement or any other agreements, appendices to agreements that sets the rights and obligations between You and Elva Baltic, to prepare VAT compliant invoices, as it is stated by regulation of Republic of Latvia, send technical notices, updates, security alerts, support and administrative messages, to communicate with you and provide customer service, to inform you about special offers, other products, seminars and other events to determine, which products, articles, solution descriptions provided by Elva Baltic attract Customer interest, so that We could tailor our products, articles, solution descriptions based on tendencies of particular industry, to operate, maintain, and improve our sites, products, and services. How We Protect Your Data Elva Baltic respects the individual's rights to privacy and makes all reasonable efforts to ensure the security and confidentiality of personal data and other information. All data in electronic format (emails, documents, uploaded batches of data, etc.) are stored either on the servers of the Elva Baltic or of its contractors, operation of which must abide local regulation of data protection of Republic of Latvia and regulation provided by European Union. Non-disclosure agreements with our employees and contractors ensure safe record keeping. Sharing Personal Data Elva Baltic may share personal information to complete any transaction or fulfill any commitment related to our products and/ or services you have requested from us. We share information: with your consent to third parties, to authorized employees of Elva Baltic and our contractors based on their direct responsibilities and involvement, for legal, protection and safety purposes, to comply with laws in the countries where we operate, to respond to requests and processes according to laws, anonymized data with social media, advertising and analytics partners. What are your rights You may access and control your personal data that Elva Baltic has obtained by contacting as described below. You may: request access to, erasure of, and updated to your personal data, withdraw your consent at any time, if you have given it, restrict Elva Baltic use your personal data for marketing purposes or where Elva Baltic performs a task in the public interest or pursues legitimate interests or those of a third party. Replies to any questions or issues raised by You are to be provided within time of ordinary business processing. Privacy Statement Changes Elva Baltic reserves the rights to change the regulations of this privacy policy at any time. We will provide you with the date when the privacy statement has been revised. Contact information If you have any queries about our Privacy Statement, please contact us: Elva Baltic 46 Robezu str., Riga LV-1004, Latvia info@elvabaltic.lv +371 67065115

readme.html.title: [POS Retail Connect] Help pages for Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central | POS Retail Connect
readme.html.keywords: [POS Retail Connect] Help pages for Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central This help is hosted on GitHub pages at address: https://elva-d365-bc.github.io/poslink Project is based on DocFX solution Considerations File naming: All file names must be in lowercase, contains only alpha numeric symbols File names must not contain national characters or space Folder structure: Root folder contains some config files for DocFx Folder /images contains images used by all apps help Folder /templates contains DocxFx templates for generating site and pdf files Folder /articles contains all help files Each app has separate subfolder under /articles poslink store_management item_management pricing_management loyalty_management label_printing gift_card_management pos chdpos scale Folder /articles/support contains support files, such as customer terms and license agreement Each app folder should contain file toc.md with table of content and folder images, where should place images specific for this app help. Installation To update and run site generated for this help You should install following components: Visual Studio Code Doc FX compiler Add path to DocFx folder to user environment variable Path Git VCS If it not installed to default path (Program Files...) You should specify path to git.exe in VSCode settings file, for example: "git.path": "d:/apps/git/bin/git.exe" Useful links: Mark down syntax Word to Markdown Convertor RGB to HEX color convertor Spell checking To enable English spell checking install spell checker VS extension SpellRight and select language in right bottom corner of VSCode. Images To include image in md file You should use link of following format: ![alt](images/image_file_name.png) Includes Folder /articles/includes contains md files with reusable text. Each file should contain one line text, that can be used many times in different md files. To use include text in md files file use link of following format: [!INCLUDE[nav_name](./articles/includes/incl_name.md)] Where path to include file should be relative to current md file. Note (Warning/Tip/Important) You can use specially formatted blocks to pay user attention. These blocks format is following > [!NOTE] > Some note content that shoul be formatted as note > and the second line of note Will formatted in following way: Note Some note content that should be formatted as note and the second line of note In place of NOTE you can use also following keywords: TIP WARNING IMPORTANT CAUTION Tables Tables also can be formatted: | Tables | Are | Cool | | ------------- | :-----------: | ----: | | col 3 is | right-aligned | $1600 | | col 2 is | centered | $12 | | zebra stripes | are neat | $1 | Tables Are Cool col 3 is right-aligned $1600 col 2 is centered $12 zebra stripes are neat $1
